titleStmt.title: SII 28.258: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 258. (A.R. No. 412 of 1913.)

summary.p: Kāmēśvara temple, central shrine, west wall.

p.hi: Danma-Irāyar Śaka 1426, Raktākshi, Siṁha śu. 13, Friday, Svāti—Irregular.

summary.p: This ruler as mentioned above is state to have been the son of Chaḷuva Narasiṅga bhujabala dēva-mahāyirāyar.

It is stated that Pākkampāḍi in Naraiyūr-kūṟṟam on the southern bank in Magadai-maṇḍalam in Malāḍu alias Jananātha-vaḷanāḍu was formerly a dēvadāna with all exemptions and full rights (sarva-mānyam) but subsequently irājakaram, and kāṇikkai began to be levied on that village. Now Eṟamāñchi-nāyakkar Tulukkaṇa-nāyakkar granted that village along with the wet and dry land in it along with the taxes kāṇikkai, viniyōgam, nalla-erudu, nal-paśu, nal-kīḍā, nalerumai, kōṇikai virimuṭṭu, āyam, talaiyārikkam, nāṭṭuviniyōgam, māvaḍai, maravaḍai, kuḷavaḍai, and such levies that were payable by the villagers for the conduct of the great worship (or worship in the month of nagara ?) and for meeting the maintenance costs of the temple-building to God Tirukkāmīśvaram-uḍaiyanāyiṉār of Āṟakaḻaḷūr in Āṟṟūr-kūṟṟam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti . śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaliśvaraṉ Ariya Irāyavipāṭaṉ pāṣaikku tappuva Irāyar kaṇṭaṉ
kaṇḍanāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭanāṭu kuṭātāṉ pūṟuvateṣaṇa Uttarāpasima catacamuttirāpati yīḻam tiṟai koṇṭu keca
veṭṭai kaṇṭaruḷiya Irācāti Irācan Irāca paramecuraṉ metiṉi mīcura kaṭṭāri cāḷuva naraciṅka pucapela tevamakāyīrāyar kumārar
tanma Irāyar bhritivirācciyamRead prativipaṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa Itaṉmel cellā niṉṟa sakāttam 1000 4 100 2 10 6 Irattaṣati[sa]ṅvacarattu ciṅka
nāyaṟṟu pūṟuva pakṣattu trayoteciyum cukkiṟavāramum peṟṟa cotināḷ malāṭākiya jananātavaḷanāṭṭu makatai maṇṭalattil
teṉkarai naraiyūr kūṟṟattu pākkampāṭi pūṟuvam nāṉkellaiyum tevatāṉam Āka saṟuvamāṉiyam Āyi naṭakkaiyil
pinpu yirācakaram kāṇikkai koḷḷukaiyil śrīmanmakāṉāṅkācāriyaṉ pāṣaikku tappuva nāyakkar kaṇṭaṉ nāḷokara kaṇṭan
vañci nārāyaṇaṉ cāṭikkāṟa kaṇṭaṉ Eṟamāñci nāyakkar tulukkaṇa nāyakkar Āṟṟūr kūṟṟattu Āṟakaḷūr Uṭaiyār
tirukkāmicuramuṭaiya nayiṉārkku pākkampāṭi nāṉkellaiyum Uḷpaṭa naṉcai puṉcai kāṇikkai viniyokam nallaeru
tu nalpacu nalkkiṭā nalerumai koṇikai virimuṭṭu Āyam talaiyārikkam nāṭṭuviniyokam māvaṭai maravaṭai kuḷavaṭai
Āḷ Amañci maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭatum makāpūcai tiruppaṇikku cantirātittavaraiyum naṭakkumpaṭikku kalveṭṭi kuṭuttom
Inta tanmattukku yātumoruvar Aḻivu paṇṇinavar keṅkai karaiyil kovatai piṟumavatai paṇṇinavan
pāvattile poka kaṭavar Ākavum §
Digital edition of SII 28.258 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
